Uplink

Computer-Assisted Reporting Newsletter, 1990–2007

Browse Topics Search

Here are some academic studies

February 1996
Investigative MethodsJournalism & NewsroomData & Databases

This collection of scholarly sources documents the evolution of computer technology adoption in newspaper journalism, from early database utilization in the 1980s through computer-assisted reporting methods in the 1990s.

"Daily Newspaper Utilization of Computer Data Bases," Frederic F. Endres, Fall 1985, Newspaper Research Journal. "Daily Use of Computers to Analyze Data," Cecilia Friend, Winter 1994, Newspaper Research Journal. "Computer-Assisted Reporting," Bruce Garrison, 1995. Lawrence Erlbaum Associates.

For a full text, see NICAR's website at http://www.nicar.org
